intent: One or two sentences describing the operator-facing change.
scope: smallest affected surface, for example safe-harbor-ingress or flight-seal-controls

operations.find: Old exact text copied from the current repo.

operations.anchor: Exact anchor copied from the current repo.
operations.insert: New text inserted after the anchor.

notes: Keep this packet small. If it needs a refactor, describe the refactor instead of pasting a giant file.
